canonical_title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT Work agentic workspace
treatment: Treat as a new ChatGPT product surface for long-running non-coding work. Reinclude only for major capability, plan, surface, connector, local-file, admin-control, or pricing changes.
known_facts: OpenAI launched ChatGPT Work on 2026-07-09 as an agent for long-running tasks across connected apps and files.
It can research and analyze information and create editable documents, spreadsheets, presentations, reports, and Sites, with progress visibility, steering, questions, and approval gates.
Work supports one-time, recurring, trigger-based, and change-monitoring Scheduled Tasks.

On web and mobile it is rolling out to paid plans except Free and Go, with Pro, Pro Lite, Enterprise, and Edu first and Plus and Business following; availability and surface details vary during rollout.
The new desktop app combines Chat, Work, and Codex; desktop Work can use user-authorized local folders while web/mobile Work cannot directly access local computer files.
ChatGPT Work is powered by GPT-5.6 and incorporates Codex technology for non-software knowledge work.
reinclude_only_if: OpenAI materially changes plan eligibility, pricing, limits, regional availability, or rollout order.
Work gains or loses major local-file, connected-app, document, spreadsheet, presentation, Sites, browser, desktop-control, or scheduled-task capabilities.
Material independent testing establishes reliability, safety, or productivity implications for long-running work.
notes: New product-surface topic; distinct from the GPT-5.6 model-release topic.
